name: end-to-end: a Google TS guide ingest routes a code rule to eslint and an ADR rule to the bundle
command:
printf '# Google TS

## Use const not var
Use const in TypeScript .ts source.

## Record an ADR
Significant design decisions are recorded as an architecture decision record.
' > g.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source g.md --source-id google-ts --json > rules.json 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const r=require(process.cwd()+"/rules.json");r.forEach((x,i)=>require("fs").writeFileSync("seg"+i+".json",JSON.stringify(x)))'; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --in seg0.json --json > c0.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/route-rule.sh" --in c0.json --json > r0.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --in seg1.json --json > c1.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/route-rule.sh" --in c1.json --json > r1.json 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const a=require(process.cwd()+"/r0.json").enforced_by,b=require(process.cwd()+"/r1.json").enforced_by;if(!a.some(x=>x.tool==="eslint"))process.exit(1);if(!b.some(x=>x.bundle==="architectural-content"))process.exit(1)' && echo e2e-ok 1>&2
